verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God is greater than my problems That I should fear them all God is greater than all my sins That I should quit every time I fall Though the oppositions may be tall I can only trust in You when I call

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your love is greater Lord Your grace is sufficient for me Your thoughts are all for the sake of my good So here I am, I lift my voice and worship You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Entrusting all my battles to You I proclaim Your Name and Power I give You praise and adoration Your Love is greater, Your Love is greater Thank You Lord
